<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Plugins</h2><a id="user-content-plugins" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Plugins" href="#plugins"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto"><strong>261 official plugins</strong> live in <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/_official"><code>plugins/_official/</code></a>. Each plugin is a <strong>portable agent-skill folder</strong> — a <code>SKILL.md</code> (readable by any agent that supports Agent Skills), plus an optional <code>open-design.json</code> manifest that gives Open Design marketplace metadata, inputs, previews, pipelines, and capability declarations. Jump straight to a category:</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">What plugins can do</h3><a id="user-content-what-plugins-can-do" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: What plugins can do" href="#what-plugins-can-do"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ul dir="auto">
<li>🤖 <strong>Run in any coding agent</strong> — <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/docs/agent-adapters.md">Claude Code</a>, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, <a href="https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw">OpenClaw</a>, <a href="https://antigravity.google" rel="nofollow">Antigravity</a>, Hermes, Kimi… through the same skill protocol the agent already knows.</li>
<li>🔁 <strong>Migrate Figma / Pencil workflows</strong> → React, Next.js, or Vue source. See <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/_official/scenarios/od-figma-migration"><code>od-figma-migration</code></a>.</li>
<li>🛠️ <strong>Refresh an existing codebase to a brand spec</strong> — point a plugin at a <code>git</code> repo + <code>DESIGN.md</code>, get a PR. See <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/_official/scenarios/od-code-migration"><code>od-code-migration</code></a>.</li>
<li>💾 <strong>Persist custom workflows</strong> — your team's reusable templates sit next to the shipped ones.</li>
</ul>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Using plugins</h3><a id="user-content-using-plugins" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Using plugins" href="#using-plugins"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Plugins are at full parity across the <strong>web UI</strong> and the <strong><code>od</code> CLI</strong> — same <code>/api/plugins</code> endpoints, pick whichever fits.</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>In the desktop / web app:</strong> open the <strong>Plugin</strong> page to browse the marketplace and click <strong>Install</strong>; inside a project's Studio, plugins appear as composer chips you click to apply (with the inputs they declare).</p>
<p dir="auto"><strong>On the command line</strong> (runs without a UI — this is the path external agents use):</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>od plugin list                       <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> list installed plugins (--task-kind / --mode / --tag filters)</span>
od plugin search <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>landing page<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>      <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> search by keyword</span>
od plugin info od-default            <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> inspect a plugin's metadata, inputs, capabilities</span>
od plugin install od-figma-migration <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> install from a registry; also accepts ./local-folder or an https://… link</span>
od plugin apply od-default --input brief=<span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>a one-page pitch for our seed round<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>
od plugin upgrade od-default         <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> upgrade</span>
od plugin uninstall od-default       <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> uninstall</span></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="od plugin list                       # list installed plugins (--task-kind / --mode / --tag filters)
od plugin search "landing page"      # search by keyword

od plugin install od-figma-migration # install from a registry; also accepts ./local-folder or an https://… link
od plugin apply od-default --input brief="a one-page pitch for our seed round"
od plugin upgrade od-default         # upgrade
od plugin uninstall od-default       # uninstall" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Every command supports <code>--json</code>, so you can pipe it through <code>jq</code> / <code>xargs</code> into automation.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Building a plugin</h3><a id="user-content-building-a-plugin" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Building a plugin" href="#building-a-plugin"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">A plugin <strong>needs only a <code>SKILL.md</code> at minimum</strong>; to list it in the Open Design marketplace, add an <code>open-design.json</code>:</p>
<div class="snippet-clipboard-content notranslate position-relative overflow-auto"><pre class="notranslate"><code>my-plugin/
├── SKILL.md            ← required: YAML frontmatter (name · description) + trigger phrasing + workflow (aim for < 500 lines)
├── open-design.json    ← needed to list: marketplace metadata + inputs + pipeline + capabilities
├── README.md           ← optional: usage, install, registry links
├── preview/            ← optional: index.html / poster.png (strongly recommended for visual plugins)
└── examples/           ← optional: concrete use cases
</code></pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="my-plugin/
├── SKILL.md            ← required: YAML frontmatter (name · description) + trigger phrasing + workflow (aim for < 500 lines)
├── open-design.json    ← needed to list: marketplace metadata + inputs + pipeline + capabilities
├── README.md           ← optional: usage, install, registry links
├── preview/            ← optional: index.html / poster.png (strongly recommended for visual plugins)
└── examples/           ← optional: concrete use cases" tabindex="0" role="button">

<p dir="auto">Core <code>open-design.json</code> fields: <code>specVersion</code> (currently <code>1.0.0</code>), <code>name</code> (stable ID), <code>version</code> (semver), <code>compat.agentSkills[].path</code> (points at <code>./SKILL.md</code>), <code>od.kind</code> (<code>skill</code> / <code>scenario</code> / <code>atom</code> / <code>bundle</code>), <code>od.taskKind</code> (<code>new-generation</code> / <code>figma-migration</code> / <code>code-migration</code> / <code>tune-collab</code>), <code>od.mode</code> (the output surface, e.g. <code>prototype</code> / <code>deck</code> / <code>live-artifact</code> / <code>image</code> / <code>video</code> / <code>hyperframes</code> / <code>audio</code> / <code>design-system</code> / <code>scenario</code>), <code>od.capabilities[]</code> (<strong>declare the minimum</strong> — a restricted install grants only <code>prompt:inject</code> by default), <code>od.inputs[]</code> (apply-time parameters).</p>
<p dir="auto">Scaffold + validate locally:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre>od plugin scaffold --id my-plugin --title <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>My Plugin<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span>   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> generate the skeleton</span>
od plugin validate ./my-plugin                          <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> check manifest / file layout</span>
pnpm guard <span class="pl-k">&&</span> pnpm --filter @open-design/plugin-runtime typecheck</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">

<p dir="auto">Full field set and runtime contract → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/spec/SPEC.md"><code>plugins/spec/SPEC.md</code></a>; developing a plugin with a coding agent → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/spec/AGENT-DEVELOPMENT.md"><code>plugins/spec/AGENT-DEVELOPMENT.md</code></a>; copy-paste minimal templates → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/spec/examples"><code>plugins/spec/examples/</code></a>.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing a plugin</h3><a id="user-content-contributing-a-plugin" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing a plugin" href="#contributing-a-plugin"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<ol dir="auto">
<li>Drop the plugin folder into <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/community"><code>plugins/community/</code></a> (third-party plugins), or — to ship it bundled with Open Design — into the matching tier of <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/_official"><code>plugins/_official/</code></a>.</li>
<li>Pass validation: <code>od plugin validate</code>, <code>pnpm guard</code>, <code>pnpm --filter @open-design/plugin-runtime typecheck</code>.</li>
<li>Fill the PR using the template in <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/spec/CONTRIBUTING.md"><code>plugins/spec/CONTRIBUTING.md</code></a> (ID, version, lane, mode, capabilities, trigger examples; attach a screenshot / preview for visual plugins).</li>
<li>To publish to an external registry (skills.sh / ClawHub / standalone GitHub) → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/spec/PUBLISHING-REGISTRIES.md"><code>plugins/spec/PUBLISHING-REGISTRIES.md</code></a>.</li>
</ol>
<p dir="auto">Plugin registry endpoint: <code>GET /api/plugins</code>. Directory overview → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/README.md"><code>plugins/README.md</code></a> (<a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/plugins/README.zh-CN.md">简体中文</a>).</p>
<hr>

<markdown-accessiblity-table data-catalyst=""><table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th>Layer</th>
<th>Stack</th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>Frontend</td>
<td>Next.js 16 App Router + React 18 + TypeScript</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Daemon</td>
<td>Node 24 · Express · SSE streaming · <code>better-sqlite3</code></td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Storage</td>
<td>Files at <code>.od/projects/<id>/</code> + SQLite at <code>.od/app.sqlite</code> + <code>media-config.json</code> (gitignored, auto-created). <code>OD_DATA_DIR</code> relocates everything.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Preview</td>
<td>Sandboxed <code>srcdoc</code> iframe + streaming <code><artifact></code> parser</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Export</td>
<td>HTML (inlined) · PDF (browser print) · PPTX (agent-driven) · ZIP · Markdown · MP4 (HyperFrames)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Desktop</td>
<td>Electron shell + sandboxed renderer + sidecar IPC (STATUS · EVAL · SCREENSHOT · CONSOLE · CLICK · SHUTDOWN)</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>Lifecycle</td>
<td>One entry point: <code>pnpm tools-dev</code> (start / stop / run / status / logs / inspect / check)</td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table></markdown-accessiblity-table>

<p dir="auto">The <a href="https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22good+first+issue%22"><code>good-first-issue</code></a> and <a href="https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+label%3A%22help+wanted%22"><code>help-wanted</code></a> labels are the easiest way in.</p>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h2 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">Contributing</h2><a id="user-content-contributing" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: Contributing" href="#contributing"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">Open Design keeps moving because contributors — designers, engineers, prompt authors — keep showing up. Many of the most-used skills, design systems, and plugins were written by people outside the core team.</p>
<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🎯 Where to start (max leverage, min change)</h3><a id="user-content--where-to-start-max-leverage-min-change" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🎯 Where to start (max leverage, min change)" href="#-where-to-start-max-leverage-min-change"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>

<td><a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/skills"><code>skills/</code></a> · spec in <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/docs/skills-protocol.md"><code>docs/skills-protocol.md</code></a></td>

</tr>

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🤖 Contributing as an agent</h3><a id="user-content--contributing-as-an-agent" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🤖 Contributing as an agent" href="#-contributing-as-an-agent"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">If <em>you are the agent reading this</em>, the fastest path is:</p>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-shell notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" dir="auto"><pre><span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 1. Boot locally</span>
git clone https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design.git
<span class="pl-c1">cd</span> open-design <span class="pl-k">&&</span> corepack <span class="pl-c1">enable</span> <span class="pl-k">&&</span> pnpm install
pnpm tools-dev run web

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 2. Find a good-first-issue and assign yourself</span>
gh issue list --label <span class="pl-s"><span class="pl-pds">"</span>good first issue<span class="pl-pds">"</span></span> --state open --limit 20
gh issue develop <span class="pl-k"><</span>number<span class="pl-k">></span>   <span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> create a branch and worktree</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 3. Make the change, run the checks</span>
pnpm guard <span class="pl-k">&&</span> pnpm typecheck
pnpm --filter @open-design/<span class="pl-k"><</span>package<span class="pl-k">></span> <span class="pl-c1">test</span>

<span class="pl-c"><span class="pl-c">#</span> 4. Open the PR</span>
gh pr create --fill</pre><div class="zeroclipboard-container">
    <clipboard-copy aria-label="Copy code to clipboard" class="ClipboardButton btn btn-invisible js-clipboard-copy m-2 p-0 d-flex flex-justify-center flex-items-center" data-copy-feedback="Copied!" data-tooltip-direction="w" value="# 1. Boot locally
git clone https://github.com/nexu-io/open-design.git
cd open-design && corepack enable && pnpm install
pnpm tools-dev run web

# 2. Find a good-first-issue and assign yourself
gh issue list --label "good first issue" --state open --limit 20
gh issue develop <number>   # create a branch and worktree

# 3. Make the change, run the checks
pnpm guard && pnpm typecheck
pnpm --filter @open-design/<package> test

# 4. Open the PR
gh pr create --fill" tabindex="0" role="button">

<div class="markdown-heading" dir="auto"><h3 tabindex="-1" class="heading-element" dir="auto">🏅 Open Design Fellow program</h3><a id="user-content--open-design-fellow-program" class="anchor" aria-label="Permalink: 🏅 Open Design Fellow program" href="#-open-design-fellow-program"><svg data-component="Octicon" class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg></a></div>
<p dir="auto">We're recruiting <strong>Open Design Fellows</strong> around the world — Fellows shape the product alongside the core team, represent Open Design officially in their region, and grow the community locally, backed by funded support ($1,000 / MR), free LLM credits, and a direct review track. Details → <a href="/nexu-io/open-design/blob/main/MAINTAINERS.md"><code>MAINTAINERS.md</code></a> and the announcement on <a href="https://discord.gg/qhbcCH8Am4" rel="nofollow">Discord</a>.</p>
<hr>
